titleStmt.title: SII 41.462: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 462. (A.R. No. 676 of 1905.) Tīrttamalai, Harur Taluk, Salem District. On the rock to the west of the central shrine of the Tīirthagirīśvara temple on the hill at Tīrttamalai.

summary.p: Records the appointment of one Patanjali-pāḍiyūran alias Sankara-baṭtan as the priest (sthānam) with hereditary rights in the temple of Tīrttamalai, by the nāṭṭār of Puṟamalai-nāḍu in Tagaḍūr-nāḍu and the chief Maṟupaḍai-kaṇḍan Jayangoṇḍchōḻan. Tagaḍūr-nāḍu is mentioned as a district of Ganga-nāḍu in Nigarilichōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśiri . kulottuṅka coḻade
vaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu nikarili coḻamaṇṭa
lattu kaṅkaṉāṭu takaṭur ṉāṭṭu puṟamalaiṉāṭ
ṭomum maṟupaṭai kaṇṭan jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻaṉum Iru Eṅkaḷ ṉāṭṭu tirttamalai Uṭai
ya mahādevarai tiruvārātaṉai ceyyak kaṭavatāka śiva
brāhmaṇa kāśyapan Araiyan śrīpatañjalipāṭi
yūraṉāna caṅkara paṭṭaṉukku puṟamalai nāṭṭil sthāna
ṅkaḷum śrīpadañjali paṭṭaṉukku dānamāka nir
vārttuk kuṭuttom In=ta sthānam Ivaṉu Iva
Ivan vaṟkattārkkum dānamāka nirvārttu kuṭutten maṟupa
ṭai kaṇṭan jayaṅkaṇṭa coḻaṉum In=ta pu
ṟamalai nāṭṭomum maṟupaṭaik kaṇṭan
jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻaṉum puṟamalaiṉāṭṭu ṉāṭ
ṭomum Eṅkaḷ ṉāṭṭu tirttamalai Uṭaiya mahā
devaṟkku Uḻuta
laṉāṟ kuḷakā tuk kuṭuttom
cenṉaṭaikku cantrātittavaṟ celuttakka
ṭa vomāṉom Itu Aḻivu ceyvā ṉka
ṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭaiy ceytār ce
yta pāvam koḷvān Eṅkaḷuṟā
na puṟamalai ṉāṭṭu cittarameḻi
paṭṭaṉukkuc ciṟappāka Ittiru
ṉakam vaiyttuk kuṭuttom
puṟamalaiṉāṭṭomum maṟupaṭai
kaṇṭaṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻaṉum
piṭalikaivāriyāl van=ta ṉey ko
ṇṭu In=ta sthānamuṭaiyaśivabrā
hmaṇan śrīpatañc(ā)li paṇṭitaṉu Ivar makka
ḷḷum Erikka kaṭava san=ti viḷak
ku patiṉaiñcu
puṟamalai nāṭṭil Ittā
naṉaṅkaḷum tirttamalaiyil
cantrātitavar ce
māka .
Digital edition of SII 41.462 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
